description: Initialize a new repository with standard scaffolding

steps.title: Gather project context
steps.description: Confirm language={{lang}}, project={{name}}, type={{type}}. Clarify any ambiguities with user.

steps.title: Initialize git repository
steps.description: Run `git init` if not already a git repo. Verify .git/ exists.

steps.title: Create .gitignore for {{lang}}
steps.description: Copy .gitignore template from {{lang}}-pro/references/gitignore. Include common patterns (.env, .DS_Store, IDE files) plus language-specific ignores.

steps.title: Create .claudeignore for {{lang}}
steps.description: Create .claudeignore with universal base (.worktrees/, *.log, .DS_Store) plus language-specific patterns. See repo-init SKILL.md for per-language templates. This is the highest-impact CC token optimization.

steps.title: Create CLAUDE.md
steps.description: Create project conventions file with: Overview, Development commands (just setup, just check), Conventions section, Architecture section. Keep minimal initially.

steps.title: Create justfile skeleton
steps.description: Create justfile with: default (list), setup (mise trust && mise install), check (placeholder), clean (placeholder). See just-pro skill for language-specific recipes.

steps.title: Create .mise.toml
steps.description: Create empty .mise.toml with commented examples. Run `mise use just@latest` and `mise use {{lang}}@latest` to pin versions.

steps.title: Initialize beads tracking
steps.description: Run `bd init -q` to create .beads/ directory. Add 'Use bd for task tracking' to CLAUDE.md.

steps.title: Create .envrc.example
steps.description: Create environment template with mise hook-env integration. This is committed; .envrc is gitignored.

steps.title: Set up CLI output compression (optional)
steps.description: Check for RTK (`command -v rtk`) and/or tokf (`command -v tokf`). If RTK installed: `rtk init --global`. If tokf installed: `tokf hook install`. RTK is the zero-config baseline. Add tokf with `.tokf/filters/` for project-specific overrides when needed. See output-compression skill.

steps.title: Language-specific setup for {{lang}}
steps.description: Point user to {{lang}}-pro skill for next steps. For Go: go mod init. For Rust: cargo init. For TypeScript: npm init. For Python: uv init.
